name: neon-brawl
description: A lightweight one- or two-player MMA game built with Canvas and JavaScript.

scripts.check: node --check combat-config.js && node --check animation-manifest.js && node --check online-simulation.cjs && node --check online-client.js && node --check game.js && node --check server.cjs && node --check scripts/png-alpha.cjs && node --check scripts/normalize-support-sheets.cjs && node --check scripts/manage-character-sprites.cjs && node --check scripts/prune-production-assets.cjs && node --check scripts/validate-animation-assets.cjs && node scripts/manage-character-sprites.cjs validate && node scripts/validate-animation-assets.cjs
scripts.test: node tests/smoke.cjs && node tests/online-simulation.cjs && node tests/online-server.cjs
